arts.ttl: 'That's the bigger fear': Could 'frustrating' Liverpool losses impact future of key trio?
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany suggests to Sports Mole that "a few frustrating defeats" for Liverpool could have an impact on the futures of Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold following their 1-0 loss to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr SACK Luis Castro following poor start to the season with 'former AC Milan boss Stefano Pioli set to become Cristiano Ronaldo's fourth manager since Saudi Arabia move'
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has now been through three managers during his time at Al-Nassr with the club announcing that Luis Castro has been dismissed on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Why San Siro has so many empty seats for Liverpool Champions League clash vs AC Milan
arts.sum: There is expected to be hundreds of empty seats at San Siro when Liverpool make the trip to AC Milan tonight

arts.ttl: Alvaro Morata is divorcing his wife Alice Campello, Ruben Loftus-Cheek is a player reborn while Divock Origi rots in the reserves... AC Milan have a host of Premier League exiles ready to face Liverpool tonight

arts.ttl: Pulisic looking to extend superb record against Liverpool
arts.sum: Now in his second season with AC Milan, the upcoming match against Liverpool will be his seventh appearance for the club in the competition, where he’ll be looking to score his third goal for the Rossoneri . During his time at Chelsea, he faced Liverpool six times, scoring two goals and providing two assists in Premier League and European Super Cup matches.
